news.title: Yusuf Ziya Gümüşel ve Kadir İstekli'ye 'sahte kemik yaşı raporu' davasında beşer yıl hapis: Karar neden önemli?
news.summary: Hiranur Vakfı kurucusu Yusuf Ziya Gümüşel ve reşit olmayan kızını evlendirdiği Kadir İstekli dahil dört sanık, çocuğun kemik yaşını büyütmek üzere evrakta sahtecilik yapmaktan beşer yıl hapis cezasına çaptırıldı.

news.title: NATO zirvesi öncesi Ankara'da 103 kişi tutuklandı
news.summary: Ankara'da gelecek ay düzenlenmesi planlanan NATO zirvesi öncesinde Ankara ve İstanbul'da yapılan operasyonlarda 233 kişi gözaltına alındı.

news.title: Nevşehir, Keçiören ve Keşan belediye başkanları AKP'ye geçti
news.summary: İYİ Partili Nevşehir Belediye Başkanı Rasim Arı ile CHP'den istifa eden Keçiören Belediye Başkanı Mesut Özarslan ve Keşan Belediye Başkanı Mehmet Özcan AKP'ye katıldı.

news.title: Kayıp vakası planlı cinayet çıktı. 18 yıl sonra 7 kişi gözaltında
news.summary: Aydın'da 2008 yılında kaybolan Naciye A'nın dosyası yeniden açıldı. Olayın planlı cinayet olduğu tespit edilirken, 7 kişi gözaltına alındı.

news.title: Sınav sistemi değişecek mi? Bakan Tekin'den açıklama
news.summary: Milli Eğitim Bakanı Yusuf Tekin, sınav sistemiyle ilgili bir değişikliğin gündemlerinde olmadığını söyledi.

news.title: Bakan Fidan, Venezuelalı mevkidaşı ile görüştü
news.summary: Dışişleri Bakanı Hakan Fidan, Venezuela Dışişleri Bakanı Yvan Gil ile telefonda görüştü. Görüşmede yaşanan depremler ile yardımlar ele alındı.

news.title: Otizmli çocuğa şiddet. Darp izlerini ailesi fark etti, öğretmenin tutukluluğu devam edecek
news.summary: Mersin'de rehabilitasyon merkezinde 5 yaşındaki otizmli çocuğu darbettiği iddia edilen öğretmen bugün hakim karşısına çıktı. Öğretmenin tutukluluğuna devam kararı verildi.

news.summary: Temmuz 2026 emekli zammı için bekleyiş devam ederken, özellikle en düşük emekli maaşına yönelik olası düzenleme milyonlarca kişinin gündeminde yer alıyor. SSK ve Bağ-Kur emeklilerinin alacağı yeni aylıkların, açıklanacak enflasyon verileri

news.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
news.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

news.title: People flee as building collapses on Caracas outskirts
news.summary: The capital and its surrounding areas have seen some of the worst damage from the 7.2 and 7.5 quakes, which hit a minute apart.

news.title: France warns even young people's health at risk as Europe's heatwave shifts east
news.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

news.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
news.summary: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.

news.title: Women alleging rape and sexual assault in France call to abolish statute of limitations
news.summary: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.

news.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
news.summary: The ruling opens the path for the Trump administration to deport hundreds of thousands of immigrants who have been living in the US for years.

news.title: Venezuela earthquakes live: At least 188 dead as rescue efforts intensify
news.summary: Venezuelans battle to rescue loved ones trapped alive beneath rubble of collapsed buildings after two major earthquakes.

news.title: WNBA: Alyssa Thomas suspended one game for fist into Cailtin Clark’s throat
news.summary: Both players were on the floor when Thomas pushed her fist into Clark's throat before getting up and stepping over her.

news.title: Venezuela rescue teams race to find earthquake survivors
news.summary: Rescue teams raced to find survivors and recover bodies after twin earthquakes rocked Venezuela on Wednesday.

news.title: Economic losses mount as Venezuela earthquake death toll grows
news.summary: Initial forecasts suggest damage could cost as much as 7 percent of the South American nation's GDP.

news.title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation initiative after vessel attacked
news.summary: Iran warns vessels to use only Tehran-approved routes as IMO halts Hormuz evacuation after ship struck.

news.title: Venezuela quake leaves La Guaira in almost total devastation
news.summary: La Guaira, the region hardest hit by two earthquakes in Venezuela, has been left devastated.

news.title: What made the deadly Venezuelan earthquakes different
news.summary: It appears the two big earthquakes in Venezuela that occurred in rapid succession may have involved two separate fault lines. Several faults intersect in this tectonically complex region.

news.title: Photos: See Venezuela destruction after earthquakes
news.summary: The earthquakes were Venezuela's largest in over a century.

news.title: Judge blocks Postal Service proposal to restrict mail-in voting under Trump's order
news.summary: A judge has blocked the U.S. Postal Service's proposals responding to President Trump's order, including not delivering ballots in states that don't turn over voter lists to the federal government.

news.title: The Supreme Court says the U.S. can turn away asylum seekers at the border
news.summary: By a 6-3 vote, the high court ruled that federal law allows the government to stop asylum seekers from physically setting foot in the United States, effectively keeping them from applying for asylum.

news.title: Trump can begin deportations of Syrian, Haitian TPS holders, Supreme Court says
news.summary: Writing for the court majority, Justice Samuel Alito that under the TPS law, the president has unreviewable authority to end the program, without intervention from the courts.

news.title: The Viking chant that became Norway's World Cup rallying cry
news.summary: Norway's long-awaited World Cup return is being powered by a viral Viking "rowing" chant that's sweeping the world, from Boston train stations to Times Square — and the heart of Norway's parliament.

news.title: ‘Constitutional coup’ claims as Zimbabwe senate approves extending presidential term

news.title: France confirms first Ebola case in doctor who had worked in DRC

news.title: Play puts spotlight on Kenya’s crisis of gender-based violence

news.title: Kenyan minister orders halt to construction of US Ebola facility

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
